description_long: This is a rustic, wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed and high side panels, designed for manual transport of goods. The cart features two large spoked wheels on either side, made of wood with metal rims, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, two long wooden handles extend outward, allowing a person to pull or push the cart. The wood is weathered, giving the cart an aged, utilitarian appearance, and the construction is reinforced with visible metal brackets and fasteners. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for carrying a variety of items, while the side panels prevent cargo from falling out. The overall design is practical and robust, typical of handcarts used in urban or rural settings for transporting supplies or produce.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with high side panels, two large spoked wheels, and long front handles for manual transport. The cart has a spacious, open cargo bed and a sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cargo bed, high side panels, and the two large wheels aligned on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cart, the spoked wheels, and the extended front handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel, the depth of the cargo bed, and the wheel alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the handles and wheels.
